title: 02 reflection peels first
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. DISTANCE RING: feral. REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Images 1 and 2 lock Tina, wardrobe, car interior, and restrained live-action photography. Image 3 locks the readable four- petal car transformation. Image 4 locks the pearly pink transformed material. ONE RULE — Tina and the real car remain perfectly still while every reflection of the car blooms open first; one reflected peel strip then crosses the boundary and begins to tug reality after it. FRAME — Quiet passenger-side medium-wide on a rain-wet street. The actual dark sedan is intact and Tina sits motionless in the back seat holding one lychee gummy. In the closed side window and the wet pavement below, the same car is unmistakably reflected already open into four broad pink-lined lotus/parasail petals. At one upper corner, a single pearly-pink reflected strip physically emerges out through the glass plane like a taut kite ribbon and lifts only the first inch of the real roof. Tina has just noticed it. Keep generous calm negative space. VISUAL PROOF — Real car intact; reflected car open; exactly one strip crosses from reflection into reality. AVOID — mirror portal, duplicate human, spectral monster, whole car already transformed, generalized magical glow, city destruction, dream montage.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage, contact sheet, split screen, or storyboard grid. This is a focused creativity-engine probe: preserve the declared identity, world, character, and material authorities, but make the prompt's one strange physical rule bold, concrete, and instantly visible. Do not domesticate the mechanism into generic glow, floating particles, or an unexplained finished state. Show physical contacts, tension, seams, material continuity, and cause-and-effect. Keep the tone youth-coded, funny, tactile, appetizing, benign, and cinematically credible—not preschool mascot art. Mango armor is opaque dense mango flesh, never orange plastic or a gummy bodybuilder. Transformed car skin is flexible lychee rind, never torn metal. No captions, labels, borders, watermarks, invented package copy, gore, weapons, or generic gummy bears.
